Class Room

java.lang.Object
Room
public class Room extends Object
Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game. Each room has a text description and exits to neighboring rooms, stored in a HashMap that maps directions (e.g. "north", "up") to rooms.
Version:
2026.05.09
Author:
Raphaël Quillaud

    Description
    Room(String pDescription, String pImageName)
    Creates a room with the given description and image.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addItem(Item pItem)
    Adds an item to this room.
    String
    getDescription()
    Returns the description of this room.
    Room
    getExit(String pDirection)
    Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
    String
    getExitString()
    Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
    String
    getImageName()
    Returns the name of the image associated with this room.
    Item
    getItem(String pName)
    Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
    String
    getItemString()
    Returns a string listing all items currently in the room.
    String
    getLongDescription()
    Returns a long description of this room, including its exits, in the form: "You are in the kitchen.
    void
    removeItem(String pName)
    Removes the item with the given name from this room.
    void
    setExit(String pDirection, Room pNeighbor)
    Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.

    • aDescription

      private final String aDescription

      private final HashMap<String,Room> aExits

      private final String aImageName

      private ItemList aItems

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(String pDescription, String pImageName)
      Creates a room with the given description and image.
      Parameters:
      pDescription - the textual description of this room
      pImageName - the name of the image file for this room

  • Method Details

    • getImageName

      public String getImageName()
      Returns the name of the image associated with this room.
      Returns:
      the image name

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the description of this room.
      Returns:
      the room description

    • getLongDescription

      public String getLongDescription()
      Returns a long description of this room, including its exits, in the form: "You are in the kitchen.\nExits : north east".
      Returns:
      a detailed description of this room

    • setExit

      public void setExit(String pDirection, Room pNeighbor)
      Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.
      Parameters:
      pDirection - the direction of the exit (e.g. "north", "east", "up")
      pNeighbor - the neighboring room in that direction

    • getExit

      public Room getExit(String pDirection)
      Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
      Parameters:
      pDirection - the direction of the desired exit
      Returns:
      the neighboring room, or null if none

    • addItem

      public void addItem(Item pItem)
      Adds an item to this room.
      Parameters:
      pItem - the item to add

    • getItem

      public Item getItem(String pName)
      Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item to retrieve
      Returns:
      the Item object, or null if not found

    • removeItem

      public void removeItem(String pName)
      Removes the item with the given name from this room.
      Parameters:
      pName - the name of the item to remove

    • getItemString

      public String getItemString()
      Returns a string listing all items currently in the room.
      Returns:
      a description of the items in the room

    • getExitString

      public String getExitString()
      Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
      Returns:
      a string describing the exits of this room
